subject: Re: April check-in
body:
D. — The new COO is rethinking our innovation stack. Rita has taken over all Digital under her Ops remit. Not ready for a formal session yet, but noted.

M.

subject: Re: TO scope check
body:
D., I am supportive in principle but the timing is wrong given the capex re-price from Q1. Hold on a formal scope memo until after the Jul planning cycle.

S.
